/usr/bin/ar qc librailguard_core.a CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/graph/NetworkGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/graph/TarjanBridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/cascade/DelayDAG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/cascade/DSUWithRollback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/analytics/SlidingWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/analytics/PassengerImpact.cpp.o CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/intervention/SpragueGrundy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/intervention/InterventionOptimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/io/CSVParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/railguard_core.dir/src/io/NTESFeedSimulator.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib librailguard_core.a
